creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
Can't install libreoffice package simultaneously with samba44 package.

Checking integrity... done (2 conflicting)
  - openldap-client-2.4.44 conflicts with openldap-sasl-client-2.4.44 on /usr/local/bin/ldapadd
  - openldap-client-2.4.44 conflicts with openldap-sasl-client-2.4.44 on /usr/local/bin/ldapadd

Samba depends on openldap-sasl-client.
LO depends on openldap-client.

It's serious issue.
